/EX
SB KEPS @ WW < CX2SA $ORB26121.1
2Line Orbital Elements 26121.AMSAT
R:260511/0338Z 4228@GB7BWR.#45.GBR.EURO LinBPQ6.0.25
R:260511/0319Z 9146@GB7BEX.#38.GBR.EURO LinBPQ6.0.25
R:260511/0258Z 53957@EI2GYB.DGL.IRL.EURO LinBPQ6.0.25
R:260508/0137Z 25437@CT1EBQ.CTLX.PRT.EU LinBPQ6.0.25
R:260508/0039Z 1768@K4WOF.FL.USA.NOAM LinBPQ6.0.24
R:260508/0029Z 49569@KD4WLE.#SFL.FL.USA.NOAM LinBPQ6.0.23
R:260508/0029Z 30999@N2MH4.#SENC.NC.USA.NOAM LinBPQ6.0.24
R:260508/0028Z 4114@N3HYM.#FRDK.MD.USA.NOAM BPQ6.0.25
R:260508/0024Z @:CX2SA.SAL.URY.SOAM #:64816 [Salto] FBB7.00e $:ORB26121.1

From: CX2SA@CX2SA.SAL.URY.SOAM
To  : KEPS@AMSAT


QST de W1STR

AMSAT Orbital Elements for Amateur Satellites in TLE Format
>From Orbital Analysis Office
New England Sci-Tech STEM Education Center
Natick MA May 01, 2026
To all radio amateurs


These element sets describe the orbits of various satellites
in use by the amateur radio community. For details see:
www.amsat.org/keplerian-elements-formats/

A daily update of element sets is available at:
www.amsat.org/tle/daily-bulletin.txt
or without bulletin text:
www.amsat.org/tle/dailytle.txt


AO-07
1 07530U 74089B   26120.59626755 -.00000031  00000-0  96085-4 0  9996
2 07530 101.9926 133.3432 0011994 220.6153 258.4322 12.53697390354550
UO-11
1 14781U 84021B   26120.63125062  .00001359  00000-0  14431-3 0  9996
2 14781  97.8024  86.7520 0007351 353.7891   6.3235 14.90668042250043
